data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. BEAR CHAMP comes from Hong Kong, where he wasn't disgraced in his first couple of runs, and has won a couple of jumpouts at Sandown which suggests he's settled in well. Expecting a bold run. 10. RAINING FIRE was no match for Bear Champ in her latest jumpout but she was good in town on debut and has the advantage of the inside alley here. 4. BOLTING BLUE was well-held on debut but that was on Heavy ground and has jumped out well nicely a couple of times since. 5. KUNG FU KID Capitalist gelding who was an AUD $ 380,000 (Magic Millions 2024 Gold Coast Yearling Sale) purchase. Did place at latest jumpout. Include in wider plays.","runners":[1,10,4,5],"exclusive":false}
